summary: Test suite covers core policy logic (max-age, keep-latest-N, max-total-size) and dry-run mode with good organization. Includes workflow structure validation. Strengths: fixed reference date for reproducibility, clear helper function (make_artifact), logical feature-based grouping, boundary condition testing (e.g., artifact exactly at age limit). Weaknesses: no error handling tests (invalid JSON, malformed fixtures, CLI arg validation), limited edge cases (no ties/simultaneous creation, no multi-workflow scenarios with all policies combined, no large dataset testing), no parametrized tests for similar cases (format_size tests), mixed concerns (workflow validation tests alongside unit tests). Missing: explicit timezone edge cases, future-dated artifacts, zero/negative sizes. Would catch happy-path regressions but miss error scenarios and unusual input combinations.
